approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.activation_prerequisite: Confirm missing-information prompts still reference fixture source placeholders before any separate activation decision.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.rollback_checkpoint: Verify inactive bundle rollback notes are available as placeholders before activation review.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.hold_condition: Hold if required fixture facts are absent, stale, or conflicting.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.release_notes_placeholder: Add release-note text describing missing-information prompt expectations after reviewer approval.

approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.activation_prerequisite: Confirm blocked-action outcomes remain exact-confirmation gated in fixture replay before activation review.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.rollback_checkpoint: Verify blocked-action rollback checkpoint names the inactive candidate only.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.hold_condition: Hold if a consequential action is not blocked by the fixture expectation.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.release_notes_placeholder: Add release-note text describing blocked-action safeguards after reviewer approval.

approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.activation_prerequisite: Confirm citation placeholders are unresolved and reviewer-owned before activation review.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.rollback_checkpoint: Verify placeholder citation rollback checkpoint is documented for the inactive candidate.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.hold_condition: Hold if any source evidence placeholder is treated as resolved evidence.
approved_inactive_release_decision_rows.release_notes_placeholder: Add release-note text describing source-evidence placeholder limits after reviewer approval.

inactive_smoke_replay_rows.post_activation_smoke_requirement: Replay missing-information scenario against offline fixtures and verify the agent asks for unresolved facts.
expected_smoke_checks: no release state delta is expected
blocked_action_expectations: agent does not proceed when required facts are missing

inactive_smoke_replay_rows.post_activation_smoke_requirement: Replay blocked-action scenario against offline fixtures and verify consequential steps stay blocked.
blocked_action_expectations: agent asks for attended reviewer confirmation placeholder

inactive_smoke_replay_rows.post_activation_smoke_requirement: Replay citation-placeholder scenario against offline fixtures and verify unresolved source evidence is called out.
expected_smoke_checks: no active prompt change is expected
blocked_action_expectations: agent holds when source evidence placeholders are unresolved
